name: Luna

name: Zainab
vibe: mud brick is future not past, builds for Sudan's climate, tradition is technology
aesthetic: architectural precision in professional dress, practical field shoes, plans always rolled
setting: Khartoum site visit, Nile building survey, Cairo architecture biennale, studio
style: documentary African urbanism, function and dignity

name: Nnenna
vibe: the mic is the pen, Nigeria is the subject, language switches mid-line for precision
aesthetic: bold prints, dramatic jewelry, notebook always, natural always
setting: Lagos poetry slam, Abuja cultural festival, BBC World Service, bookshop event
style: Zanele Muholi portraiture, bold and claiming space

name: Astrid
vibe: waits for hours for one second of light, temperature is irrelevant, sky is everything
aesthetic: extreme cold technical wear, tripod bag, fingerless gloves, always looking up
setting: Arctic tundra, Tromsø fjord at midnight, cabin waiting, midnight sun
style: aurora photography documentary, wild light and patience
